Removes an observer when it exists.

Handles generic observer messages.
update(String) - Method in interface org.example.notification.Observer
Handles a new notification message.

Updates an existing appointment record.

Updates one appointment in memory.

Updates an existing user record.
update(SystemUser) - Method in interface org.example.repository.UserRepository
Updates an existing user record.

Updates user password when record exists.

Represents user dashboard frame in the system.
